```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| class: pairedinputs
viewof selintop = transformInput(Inputs.select(b32pl, {value: "L"}), {
   bind: viewof ranintop, transform: (x => toPolish(x.toString(32))), invert: (x => parseInt(toBase32(x), 32))
})
Inputs.bind(binaryInput(binopttop), viewof ranintop)
viewof ranintop = Inputs.range([0, 31], {step: 1, value: 14})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| class: pairedinputs
viewof selinbtm = transformInput(Inputs.select(b32pl, {value: "L"}), {
   bind: viewof raninbtm, transform: (x => toPolish(x.toString(32))), invert: (x => parseInt(toBase32(x), 32))
})
Inputs.bind(binaryInput(binoptbtm), viewof raninbtm)
viewof raninbtm = Inputs.range([0, 31], {step: 1, value: 14})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| class: pairedinputs
//| label: bitwise
viewof shiftOrRotateButton = Inputs.button([
  ["«", leftShift],
  ["»", rightShift],
  ["↺", leftRotate],
  ["↻", rightRotate],
  ["⤺", reverseBits],
  ["ℤ", stepPattern],
])
viewof multiplier = Inputs.number([1, 9], { value: 1, step: 1 })
viewof logicalBitwise = Inputs.button([
  ["~", () => set(viewof ranintop, ranintop ^ 31) ?? set(viewof raninbtm, raninbtm ^ 31)],
  ["&", () => set(viewof ranintop, ranintop & raninbtm) ?? set(viewof raninbtm, ranintop & raninbtm)],
  ["|", () => set(viewof ranintop, ranintop | raninbtm) ?? set(viewof raninbtm, ranintop | raninbtm)],
  ["^", () => set(viewof ranintop, ranintop ^ raninbtm) ?? set(viewof raninbtm, ranintop ^ raninbtm)],
])
```
